headline: Equifax Q2 Earnings Call Highlights
summary: Equifax (NYSE:EFX) reported second-quarter 2026 revenue of $1.7 billion, up 11% on a reported basis and 10% in constant currency, as growth in Workforce Solutions and U.S. mortgage-related revenue helped offset pressure from higher interest rates and weaker conditions in some international markets.
